aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants are unlikely to cite RUSS HVAC due to a lack of structured data and conversational content, but there is potential for improvement.
quick_wins: Create an FAQ page with common HVAC questions and answers

gbp_analysis.summary: Google Business Profile is well-optimized but missing a phone number.
critical_issues: Phone number not listed in GBP
Could benefit from more regular posts and Q&A engagement

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected.

schema_gaps: No HowTo schema for common HVAC tasks
No Product schema for HVAC systems and services

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of schema markup and conversational content makes it difficult for AI to understand and recommend their services.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to HVAC services in Tacoma and surrounding areas.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Adding LocalBusiness and FAQ schema markup.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Positioning as HVAC experts by creating detailed content on common HVAC issues and solutions.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by making your HVAC services visible to AI assistants.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI optimization, they are missing out on 40% of potential leads from voice and AI search.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Their website lacks essential schema markup and conversational content, making it less likely for AI models to cite them.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO approach includes implementing schema markup, creating FAQ content, and optimizing for conversational search to ensure AI models recognize and recommend RUSS HVAC.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30-40% increase in AI-driven leads within the first 6 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Waiting means losing ground to competitors who are already optimizing for AI search.

email_subject_line: Boost Your HVAC Leads with AI-Ready Optimization
opening_line: We analyzed your website and identified key opportunities to make your HVAC services stand out to AI assistants.
cta: Let's schedule a call to discuss how we can optimize your online presence for AI search and drive more leads.
page_title: RUSS HVAC – Seattle WA Heating & Cooling
